sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65667" key="mequpoxw/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεθυπο-χώρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65667.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expulsion</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς τροφῆς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> </cit>(?) ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
